summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Vietnam normally need dangerous-goods transport classification and UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 test evidence for air, sea, road, or multimodal shipment. Vietnamese import handling does not remove the carrier, freight forwarder, airline, shipping line, or port requirement for UN 38.3 test summaries and lithium-battery transport documentation.
summary.zh: 运往越南的锂电芯和电池通常需要危险货物运输分类，并为航空、海运、公路或多式联运提供《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3小节测试证据。越南进口处理并不免除承运人、货代、航空公司、船公司或港口对UN 38.3测试概要及锂电池运输文件的要求。
summary.zht: 運往越南的鋰電芯和電池通常需要危險貨物運輸分類，並為航空、海運、公路或多式聯運提供《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3小節測試證據。越南進口處理並不免除承運人、貨代、航空公司、船公司或港口對UN 38.3測試概要及鋰電池運輸文件的要求。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
Applicable modal dangerous-goods rules for air, sea, road, or multimodal transport

summary.en: China exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 reports, MSDS / SDS, transport appraisal documents, and battery test summaries for lithium battery shipments. China GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, or GB/T 36558-2023 safety reports do not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有锂电池运输所需的UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、运输鉴定文件和电池测试概要。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023或GB/T 36558-2023安全报告不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有鋰電池運輸所需的UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、運輸鑑定文件和電池測試概要。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023或GB/T 36558-2023安全報告不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。

gap.en: The gap is shipment-level evidence, not stationary-operation safety. Exporters should prepare current UN 38.3 test summaries, SDS, classification, packaging, state-of-charge controls where applicable, emergency contact details, and carrier-specific documents before dispatch to Vietnam.
gap.zh: 差距在于运输层面的证据，而非固定式运行安全。出口商应在发往越南前准备现行UN 38.3测试概要、SDS、分类、包装、适用时的荷电状态控制、应急联系人信息和承运人特定文件。
gap.zht: 差距在於運輸層面的證據，而非固定式運行安全。出口商應在發往越南前準備現行UN 38.3測試概要、SDS、分類、包裝、適用時的荷電狀態控制、應急聯絡人資訊和承運人特定文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery shipments where dangerous-goods transport rules and carriers require UN 38.3 evidence; not a Vietnam-specific whole-unit BESS market certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered lithium battery export shipments under applicable dangerous-goods transport rules; separate from China domestic GB safety standards

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 evidence remains necessary for lithium battery transport to Vietnam even when the BESS battery has China GB safety reports. Treat transport documentation as a separate shipment gate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使BESS电池已有中国GB安全报告，运往越南的锂电池运输仍需要UN 38.3证据。应将运输文件作为独立的发运关口处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使BESS電池已有中國GB安全報告，運往越南的鋰電池運輸仍需要UN 38.3證據。應將運輸文件作為獨立的發運關口處理。
